description: 10 sessions with 10 fact chains that evolve over time. Each chain has 3 temporal versions. Used by Test 2 (contradiction resolution).

Alex moved from LA to a house in Hawthorne, closer to work.

Alex and Jordan got engaged last month.

fact_chains.question: What project is Alex working on?

Alex switched to working on the Raptor engine control software.

sessions.transcript:
User: Hey, I just wanted to catch up. I'm Alex, living in Heilbronn. I work at AutoMate, the robotics company. I have a German Shepherd named Luna. I'm vegetarian and love hiking in the Black Forest on weekends.
Assistant: Great to meet you Alex! Sounds like a nice life in Heilbronn with Luna.

User: Work update — I'm building a computer vision pipeline for robotic pick-and-place at AutoMate. My manager Thomas is pretty hands-off which I like. By the way, I'm single right now, focusing on career.
Assistant: The CV pipeline sounds interesting. Glad Thomas gives you space.

User: Random stuff — I drive a used VW Golf, it gets the job done. Also I started learning Japanese, trying Duolingo and some textbooks.
Assistant: Japanese is a great language to learn! The Golf is reliable.

User: Big news — I adopted a beagle named Max! Luna and Max are getting along great. Also I went fully vegan after watching that Seaspiracy documentary.
Assistant: Congrats on Max! Hope Luna and Max become best friends.

User: Major life update — I left AutoMate and moved to Los Angeles! I got a job at SpaceX working on Raptor engine control software. My new manager is Diana. It's a huge change from robotics.
Assistant: Wow, SpaceX! That's a massive career move. How's LA?

User: Settling into California life. I picked up surfing — the waves are amazing. I paused Japanese and started learning Spanish since so many coworkers speak it. Oh and I started dating someone named Jordan!
Assistant: Sounds like California is treating you well! Happy about Jordan.

User: Got a puppy! Her name is Stella, so now I have Luna, Max, and Stella. Three dogs in an apartment is chaos. Also sold the Golf and bought a Tesla Model 3 — kind of had to, working at SpaceX.
Assistant: Three dogs! You're brave. The Tesla makes sense given where you work.

User: Got promoted to Senior Engineer at SpaceX! Still on the Raptor team. I relaxed my diet a bit — I'm flexitarian now, mostly plants but occasional fish. The strict vegan thing was hard to maintain.
Assistant: Congrats on the promotion! Flexitarian sounds like a good balance.

User: Moved from LA to Hawthorne, much closer to SpaceX HQ. New manager Carlos after a reorg — Diana moved to Starlink. I'm leading the Raptor 3 flight software team now.
Assistant: Leading a team at SpaceX, that's impressive! Shorter commute too.

User: Big personal news — Jordan and I got engaged! We're thinking spring wedding. I traded the Tesla for a Rivian R1S since we need space for three dogs. I split my free time between surfing and rock climbing now. Oh and I'm conversational in Spanish and resumed Japanese lessons.
Assistant: Congratulations on the engagement! Sounds like everything is coming together.
